'''''Star Wars'' 39''' is the thirty-ninth issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] has established a new base on the ice planet called [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]], but an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] discovers their location and transmits the data before it can be destroyed. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] has been attacked by one of the [[Wampa/Legends|Wampas]] and is taken to the creatures cave, but Luke escapes from its custody and, with the help of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], returns to [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Piett]] receives the probe droid's signal and reports his findings to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] who immediately orders the fleet to the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]].

==Continuity==
This is Chapter One of the six-part adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. The price changed from forty cents to fifty cents with this issue. As mentioned in the editorial comment of the letters page, [[Al Williamson]] and [[Carlos Garzón]] each pencil and ink the issues of the comics adaptation.
